§ Vendor Network · Selective Onboarding

Stop paying for tire-kickers.
Get hot, pre-scored leads.
Pay only when you close.

SolarSubsidies.com ranks for "solar subsidy in [district]" across all 75 UP districts. Customers complete a 4-step qualifier before reaching you — district, monthly bill, property type, timeline, intent — all scored and tiered HOT/WARM/COLD before we make a single match.

Apply for vendor network → See how it works
UPNEDA approval required MNRE empanellment required One vendor per lead Pay 7-8% only on close
§ The Customer Acquisition Problem

Justdial gives you noise.
Google Ads gives you cost.
SolarSubsidies gives you buyers.

Justdial / Sulekha

₹100-300

per lead, paid upfront

  • Lead Quality50%+ are tire-kickers or wrong district
  • CompetitionSame lead sold to 5-10 vendors simultaneously
  • Pre-qualificationNone. Just name + phone
  • Net cost per close₹3,000-6,000 (assuming 5-10% close rate)

Google / Facebook Ads

₹40-120

per click, no purchase intent guaranteed

  • Lead QualityDepends entirely on your landing page
  • CompetitionYou bid against TataPower, Adani, every regional EPC
  • Pre-qualificationNone on platform; you must build it
  • Net cost per close₹5,000-15,000 (CPL ₹500-1,200 × 8-12% conversion)

SolarSubsidies.com

7-8%

of system value, paid only when you close

  • Lead Quality4-step qualifier · scored 1-10 · HOT/WARM tiered
  • CompetitionExclusive match — 1 vendor per lead
  • Pre-qualificationDistrict + bill + timeline + property + intent
  • Net cost per close₹14,000-17,000 on a typical 3 kW ₹2.1L deal

Yes, our per-deal cost is higher in absolute terms. But it's paid only when you actually close. Zero risk, zero wasted spend on browsers. And because we deliver scored, exclusive leads with intent + timeline already captured, your close rate runs 25-40% vs the 5-10% you see on Justdial.

§ How it works · 5 stages

From customer search to your bank account.

01 · SEO

Customer finds us on Google

Search "solar subsidy in Lucknow" or any of 75 UP districts. Our pages rank top 3.

02 · Qualifier

4-step calculator scores intent

District · bill amount · timeline · property type · intent. Score 1-10, tier HOT/WARM/COLD.

03 · Match

Exclusive vendor match

We match HOT/WARM leads to your network 1:1 by district. No bidding wars. No duplicate sales.

04 · You close

You contact within 4 hrs

WhatsApp/call the lead. Schedule site visit. Quote. Win. Standard sales process — no platform interference.

05 · Pay

7-8% on confirmed install

Pay commission only after net meter activation. No upfront, no monthly fees, no subscription.

§ What our leads actually look like

This is what hits your WhatsApp.

No half-filled inquiry forms. No "please send me details." Every lead arrives pre-scored, district-filtered, and timeline-qualified.

Respond within 4 hours

Lucknow (MVVNL)

₹6,500

5 kW recommended
Property
Independent home (Gomti Nagar)
Intent
Cut electricity bill
Timeline
THIS MONTH ⚡
Subsidy quoted
₹1,08,000 stacked
Net cost shown
₹2,42,000

Estimated commission on close: ₹19,600 (8% of ₹2.42 L net). Already pre-qualified on UPNEDA process, has consented to WhatsApp contact, knows the subsidy math going in.

Compare this to a typical Justdial lead: "Mr. Sharma, +91XXX, interested in solar." That's it. You spend 20 minutes on the phone before discovering they have a flat in an unregistered RWA and a ₹1,200/month bill.

§ Vendor Requirements

We're selective.

We promise customers vetted, UPNEDA-approved installers. To keep that promise we onboard 1-2 vendors per district cluster — not 50.

Required to apply

  • Active MNRE empanellment (any tier)
  • Active UPNEDA approved-vendor listing (mandatory for state subsidy)
  • Minimum 25 residential rooftop installations completed in the last 24 months
  • Physical office or service hub in at least one UP district
  • GSTIN, valid PAN, ability to issue compliant invoices
  • Commitment to respond to leads within 4 business hours (WhatsApp or call)
  • Use only BIS-certified panels and CEA-approved inverters

Not eligible (currently)

  • Vendors only doing solar pumps (PM-KUSUM only — we handle rooftop)
  • Vendors with active consumer complaints on NCDRC or UPNEDA helpdesk
  • "Resellers" with no in-house installation crew
  • Vendors outside UP (multi-state expansion in v0.7)
§ Commission Structure

How payouts work.

Standard commission: 7-8% of system gross value

Commission is calculated on the gross system value (before subsidy), not net cost. This aligns incentives: you bill the customer normally, we don't squeeze your margin.

System size Typical gross value Commission @ 7% Commission @ 8%
3 kW₹2,10,000₹14,700₹16,800
5 kW₹3,50,000₹24,500₹28,000
10 kW₹7,00,000₹49,000₹56,000
RWA/Group Housing (100 kW)₹70,00,000₹4,90,000₹5,60,000

Rate determined by performance

Months 1-6 (probation): 7% standard rate while we track close rate, customer satisfaction, and time-to-respond.

After month 6: Top 30% of vendors by close rate move to 8% rate plus priority routing for HOT leads. Bottom 20% are removed from network.

Payment terms

Commission becomes payable on net meter activation (not on contract signing — protects against deals that fall through). Invoice issued within 7 days of activation, payment due net-30. NEFT/UPI/cheque all accepted.

§ Vendor FAQ

Common questions.

How many leads will I get per month?

Depends on district volume and your acceptance criteria. At current SEO traffic levels (early days), expect 5-15 qualified leads per district per month. We do NOT promise minimum lead volume — that creates incentive to flood you with garbage. Quality over quantity.

What if I can't service a lead?

You have 4 business hours to claim or decline each lead. Decline is no-penalty for genuine reasons (district capacity, technical mismatch). Repeated decline of HOT leads in your service district affects rate tier.

Can I use my own pricing?

Yes. We don't dictate pricing. Our calculator shows customers the typical ₹70,000/kW UP market rate — you can quote higher (with justification) or lower. Customers see the subsidy math from us; the system price comes from you.

What if the customer doesn't close with me?

No commission owed. We only charge on closed deals (defined as: contract signed + net meter activated). If a lead bails or chooses a different vendor outside our network, you pay nothing.

Can I cherry-pick only large deals?

Yes — within reason. You'll set your minimum system size during onboarding (e.g., "only ≥3 kW residential or ≥10 kW commercial"). Leads below your minimum get routed elsewhere. But systematically declining qualified leads in your range affects your rate tier.

Is this exclusive? Can I still work with Justdial/Sulekha?

Non-exclusive. You can run any other marketing channels. Our only requirement: leads we send must remain ours (you can't claim a SolarSubsidies lead came from Justdial to avoid commission). Tracked via Lead Match IDs.

What about disputed commissions?

Standard arbitration: customer-side confirmation of installation via WhatsApp/SMS. If customer confirms install with vendor name + date, commission is owed. Disputes resolved via UPNEDA service record (which is verifiable on portal).

How do I get added to vendor listings on district pages?

After onboarding, accepted vendors are listed on the relevant district pages (e.g., Lucknow.html → MVVNL section → "Trusted local installers"). This drives organic discovery alongside paid lead routing. Listings activate after first successful close.

Ready to stop paying for tire-kickers?

Application takes 5 minutes. Manual review takes 48-72 hours. We onboard 1-2 vendors per district cluster.

Apply for Vendor Network →
